title: Section 6
content: As from the appointed day— (a) there shall be allotted one seat to the State of Nagaland in the Council of States; (b) in the Fourth Schedule to the Constitution, in the Table— (i) entries 16 to 19 shall be renumbered as entries 17 to 20; (ii) after entry 15, the following entry shall be inserted, namely:— "16. Nagaland. . . . . . . . . . . . . . .1", (iii) at the end, for the figures "224", the figures "225" shall be substituted.
